wylex.blurb: Icomply installs and upgrades Wylex consumer units, RCBO boards and distribution equipment across the North West, bringing older metalclad and dual-RCD setups up to current BS 7671 practice. Our electricians service and fault-find Wylex circuits on landlord portfolios, commercial fit-outs and domestic rewires, then issue full certification for insurers and compliance files. Trade customers can also order Wylex breakers, blanks, busbars and engineer spares through our Stockport-based shop for same-region delivery and site collection.

xtralis-vesda.blurb: Icomply designs, installs and maintains Xtralis VESDA aspirating smoke detection for high-risk and high-value sites across Greater Manchester, Lancashire, Cheshire and Merseyside. From pipe-network layout and detector commissioning to filter changes, sensitivity checks and BS 5839 servicing, our engineers keep VESDA systems audit-ready for FM teams and insurers. Landlords and contractors can also source VESDA filters, sampling points and engineer consumables from our North West trade counter.

yale.blurb: Icomply supplies, installs and services Yale intruder alarms and smart security kits for homes, HMOs and small commercial premises throughout the North West. Whether you need a new Yale system, a keypad or contact replacement, or annual checks aligned with PD 6662 / BS EN 50131 best practice, our engineers deliver tidy installs and clear handover paperwork. Trade partners and landlords can buy Yale PIRs, door contacts, sirens and battery packs via our Stockport shop with regional support on hand.

zenitel.blurb: Icomply installs and maintains Zenitel critical communications and intercom systems for commercial sites, transport hubs and secure facilities across the North West. Our team handles master stations, door substations, IP integration and planned servicing so staff always have clear, reliable two-way audio when it matters. Facilities managers and contractors can order Zenitel station accessories, handsets and weatherproof modules through our trade shop with certification and commissioning support included on install projects.

zettler.blurb: Icomply installs, extends and services Zettler nurse call systems for care homes, hospitals and supported-living schemes across Greater Manchester and the wider North West. From call points and pear leads to panel batteries and corridor indicators, we keep Zettler platforms responsive and aligned with HTM 08-03 guidance, with full documentation for CQC and estates audits. Care operators and electrical contractors can stock Zettler consumables via our trade shop for planned maintenance and emergency call-outs.

ziton.blurb: Icomply commissions and maintains Ziton addressable fire detection across commercial, industrial and multi-occupancy buildings in the North West. We install panels, loops and field devices to BS 5839, carry out periodic servicing and provide clear certification for landlords, insurers and responsible persons. Our trade shop stocks Ziton-compatible detectors, call points, batteries and engineer labels so contractors can complete snags and reactive repairs without delay.

zumtobel.blurb: Icomply specifies, installs and tests Zumtobel emergency lighting for offices, education, healthcare and retail schemes across the North West. Our electricians handle maintained and non-maintained luminaires, exit signage and central-battery interfaces, then complete BS 5266 duration testing with full logbooks for building managers. Trade buyers can source Zumtobel emergency fittings, batteries and mounting accessories from our Stockport shop with install and certification support available on every project.
